description: Returned by hydrate-project skill. Confirms a portfolio project has been hydrated via the mining pipeline.

vectors_written.description: Number of ChromaDB vectors written for this project

mdx_patched.description: Confirms AST patcher successfully injected data into index.mdx frontmatter

schema_valid.description: Confirms Pydantic/Zod schema validation passed on injected payload

ledger_entry.description: SQLite ledger row ID confirming this project is marked complete

validation_note: schema_valid must be true. mdx_patched must be true. If either is false, do not mark ticket complete.
